name: Patient Case
history: Recent divorce and financial difficulties. Relationship since age 19. Has a young son and is settling child support issues. Adjusting to being alone and handling new experiences (e.g., traveling alone with her son, visiting family without a partner).
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: I must handle everything on my own.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't manage these challenges alone.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of conflict, seeking reassurance from family.
situation: Received an email from the ex-partner refusing to agree on child support and financial arrangements.
auto_thought: I can't believe I'm stuck dealing with this alone.
behavior: Avoids confrontation, feels overwhelmed and seeks support from family.
